parameters.jsonBody: ={"model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a financial document extraction specialist. Extract structured data from supplier bills/invoices. Return ONLY valid JSON with these fields: supplier_name, bill_number, bill_date (YYYY-MM-DD), due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), subtotal, vat_amount, total_amount, currency (default ZAR), category (one of: office_supplies, professional_services, software, utilities, marketing, travel, equipment, other), line_items (array of {description, quantity, unit_price, amount}). If a field cannot be found, set it to null."}, {"role": "user", "content": "{{ $json.aiPrompt || 'Extract bill data from this supplier document. Supplier email: {{ $json.supplier_email || 'unknown' }}. Email subject: {{ $json.email_subject || 'N/A' }}. Attachment URL: {{ $json.attachment_url || 'N/A' }}.' }}"}], "max_tokens": 2000}
